docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIMPKINS, JERRY ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $100.00 (FILED AT REQUEST OF LITIGANT) FILED BY SIMPKINS, JERRY AS TO DEFENDANT HSIEH, JENNE DBA ELECTROMANIA (BOOST MOBILE) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-05-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SEE SIGNATURE SERVED APR-26-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HSIEH, JENNE DBA ELECTROMANIA (BOOST MOBILE)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-05-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUN-26-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PARTIES AGREED THAT THE PLAINTIFF WILL RETURN THE PRODUCT PURCHASED FROM THE DEFENDANT AND WILL RECEIVE A $75.00 REFUND. NO APPEARANCES REQUIRED IF PARTIES ARE SATISIFED. PLAINTIFF JERY SIMPKINS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JENNE HSIEH DBA ELECTROMANIA (BOOST MOBLE) IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT'S HUSDAND KYONGSON PAK IS PRESENT ON HER BEHALF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF.
